languages.text: "Эоганн, тут нечего стабилизировать. Ты создал калеку".
"Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, тут нечего стабилизировать. Ты создал калеку".

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."
"Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."
"Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."

languages.text: 「エオガン、安定させるものはない。あなたは救えぬ病人を作った」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."

traits.locale_text: 「エオグン、安定させるものはない。あなたは救えぬ病人を作った」

languages.text: “伊奥贡，没什么好稳定的了。你创造了一个无可救药的废人。”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，没什么好稳定的了。你创造了一个无可救药的废人。”

languages.text: « Eogunn, il n'y a rien à stabiliser. Vous avez créé un invalide qu'il est impossible de soigner. »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, il n'y a rien à stabiliser. Vous avez créé un invalide qu'il est impossible de soigner. »

languages.text: «Eogunn, aquí no hay nada que estabilizar. Ha creado a un lisiado insalvable».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, aquí no hay nada que estabilizar. Ha creado a un lisiado insalvable».

languages.text: "Eogunn, stabilize edilecek bir şey yok. Kurtarılamaz, sakat bir şey yarattın."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, stabilize edilecek bir şey yok. Kurtarılamaz, sakat bir şey yarattın."

languages.text: "Da gibt es nichts zu stabilisieren, Eogunn. Ihr habt einen unrettbaren Invaliden erschaffen."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, there is nothing to stabilise. You have created an unsalvageable invalid."

traits.locale_text: "Da gibt es nichts zu stabilisieren, Eogunn. Ihr habt einen unrettbaren Invaliden erschaffen."
